interventions.name: B1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: structure-to-function comparison routines that force explicit biomolecule and organelle role explanations

interventions.name: B1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: membrane transport scenario sorts that separate passive, active, and selective processes

interventions.name: B1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: energy pathway maps that connect inputs, transformations, and outputs in respiration or photosynthesis

interventions.name: B1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: cross-scale prompts linking molecular properties to whole-cell performance
